metadata.title: How Many Revisions Should You Offer | FlowDockr Guide
metadata.description: Set revision rounds based on project price and risk.

page.title: How Many Revisions Should You Offer

hero.title: Most freelancers under-price revisions.
hero.description: Use a clear revision-round framework tied to project value.

usage.label: Guide
usage.title: Problem -> Why -> Solution
usage.description: Choose revision count with intent, not guesswork.

items.title: Problem
items.description: Unlimited revisions turn fixed-price jobs into open-ended work.

items.title: Why it happens
items.description: No upfront revision cap is communicated or signed off.

items.title: Solution
items.description: Offer 1-5 rounds and attach explicit extra-round pricing.

cta.title: Generate your revision policy ->
cta.description: Get a client-ready revision structure in one click.
